'''Four-One''' was a [[Clone Lieutenant/Legends|clone trooper lieutenant]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. He piloted a [[Low Altitude Assault Transport/infantry/Legends|LAAT/i]] [[Gunship/Legends|gunship]] during the [[Battle of Haruun Kal/Legends|Battle of Haruun Kal]]. Under his command were 2nd Lieutenant [[CL-33/890]] and two Auxiliary Heavy-Weapons Specialists, [[Seven-Four]], and [[Eight-Three]].<ref name="Equipment (short story)" />

His gunship was assigned to the medium cruiser ''[[Halleck]]'' and sustained heavy damage during the action at [[Haruun Kal/Legends|Haruun Kal]], though the ship endured and assisted with the post-battle rescue of stranded surviving [[Clone trooper/Legends|clones]].<ref name="Equipment (short story)" />
